name: Fresh Ham with Celery, Avgolemono
method: Add water to cover and salt and pepper.
Bring to a boil, cover, and simmer until meat is almost done, about 1 hour.
Scrub and scrape celery and cut into 2-inch pieces.
Add celery to meat and more water to cover; simmer an additional 30 minutes, until meat and vegetable are done.
Beat eggs in a small bowl until frothy.
Add flour and lemon juice, beating well.
Slowly add 2 cups hot liquid from the pot, beating constantly.
Pour sauce back into pot, shaking gently to distribute.
Do not allow sauce to boil.
